title: Preparation of feeder-free iPSCs culture
author: Celeste M M. Karch
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x83fryn

steps.title: Coat appropriate sized tissue culture dish with Matrigel
steps.instruction: Coat appropriate sized tissue culture dish with Matrigel. Swirl plate to distribute evenly across surface of dish.

steps.title: Allow Matrigel to set for 01:00:00...
steps.instruction: Allow Matrigel to set for 01:00:00 at room temperature or in a 37 °C humidified chamber. This will provide enough cells for a full 96 well plate of neural aggregates. We typically thaw 1 vial of iPSC into 1 well of a 6 well (1mL Matrigel per well). Volumes below are based on 6 well plates.

steps.title: Prepare mTeSR1 feeder-free medium by aseptically...
steps.instruction: Prepare mTeSR1 feeder-free medium by aseptically adding 100 mL of thawed 5x supplement to 400 mL Basal Medium.

steps.title: Add 5 mL penicillin/streptomycin if needed
steps.instruction: Add 5 mL penicillin/streptomycin if needed. Mix thoroughly and warm to room temperature.

steps.title: Thaw iPSCs (1-2 x 10 6...
steps.instruction: Thaw iPSCs (1-2 x 10 6 cells/mL) in a 37 °C water bath.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of thawed iPSC...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of thawed iPSC to 9 mL of DMEM/F12 in a 15mL conical tube (Do not mix). Centrifuge iPSC at 750 rpm for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Carefully aspirate medium from iPSC pellet
steps.instruction: Carefully aspirate medium from iPSC pellet. Add 2 mL of mTeSR1 supplemented with Rock inhibitor (10 μM final) - avoid breaking up clumps of suspended cells.

steps.title: Aspirate Matrigel from tissue culture dish
steps.instruction: Aspirate Matrigel from tissue culture dish. Add 2 mL of suspended iPSCs. Place plate in 37 °C , 5% CO 2 and 95% humidified chamber, making a “T” motion to ensure even distribution of cells.

steps.title: Change medium with 2 mL of fresh mTesR1 medium daily
steps.instruction: Change medium with 2 mL of fresh mTesR1 medium daily. As iPSC become more confluent, increase mTesR to 3mL per well.
